steps.title: Track the text's focus
steps.content: The passage first notes that Leonard Blake championed Avery's work, then focuses on Blake's praise for Little, Big. It explains that the novel blends two modes Keller treated as separate.

steps.title: Match purpose to focus
steps.content: A invents a comparison with a poet, C says the text argues for strict categories even though it says the novel crosses them, and D invents authorial inspiration. The purpose is to present why Blake valued the novel. The answer is B.
